query: SELECT id, code, title, description, courseType FROM courses WHERE courseType = 'ged' ORDER BY code;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, code, title, description, courseType FROM courses WHERE courseType = 'ged' ORDER BY code;

rows.title: GED Language Arts
rows.description: Preparation for the GED Reasoning Through Language Arts test including reading, writing, and grammar.

rows.title: GED Mathematics
rows.description: Comprehensive preparation for the GED Mathematics test covering algebra, geometry, and data analysis.

rows.title: GED Science
rows.description: Comprehensive coverage of life science, physical science, and earth science topics for the GED exam.

rows.title: GED Social Studies
rows.description: Preparation for the GED Social Studies test covering civics, history, geography, and economics.

stdout:
id	code	title	description	courseType

660003	GED-MATH	GED Mathematics	Comprehensive preparation for the GED Mathematics test covering algebra, geometry, and data analysis.	ged
660005	GED-SCI	GED Science	Comprehensive coverage of life science, physical science, and earth science topics for the GED exam.	ged
